generated_oml:
// C3: Physical sensing components
instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Swing‑angle encoder measuring the pendulum motion of the hoist"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleTelemetryTopic
]
instance Anemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Anemometer recording wind speed around the crane"
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedTelemetryTopic
]
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor encoder counting steps of the cart and hoist motors"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorPositionTelemetryTopic
]
instance ElectromagnetStateSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Electromagnet state sensor indicating on/off of the pickup electromagnet"
    DTDFVocab:producedData ElectromagnetStateTelemetryTopic
]

// C4: Physical to virtual interaction – Data transmitted
instance SwingAngleTelemetryTopic : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]
instance WindSpeedTelemetryTopic : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Anemometer
]
instance MotorPositionTelemetryTopic : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]
instance ElectromagnetStateTelemetryTopic : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ElectromagnetStateSensor
]

// C10: Models
instance CADGeometryModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD geometry of the gantry crane frame and components from Autodesk Fusion360"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEnabler
]
instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Mathematical kinematic model governing cart and hoist movement"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TrajectoryEnabler
]
instance PhysicsBasedSimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Physics‑based simulation model used by the Simulation Service"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEnabler
]

// C10: Data
instance SwingAngleTimeSeries : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑series of swing‑angle measurements stored in TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleTelemetryTopic
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ValidationEnabler
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FaultDetectionEnabler
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GrafanaEnabler
]
instance WindSpeedTimeSeries : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑series of wind‑speed measurements stored in TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:fromData WindSpeedTelemetryTopic
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ValidationEnabler
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FaultDetectionEnabler
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GrafanaEnabler
]
instance MotorPositionTimeSeries : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑series of motor encoder counts stored in TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionTelemetryTopic
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ValidationEnabler
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FaultDetectionEnabler
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GrafanaEnabler
]
instance ElectromagnetStateTimeSeries : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑series of electromagnet state stored in TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ElectromagnetStateTelemetryTopic
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ValidationEnabler
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FaultDetectionEnabler
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GrafanaEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance TimescaleDBEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "TimescaleDB instance for storing telemetry time‑series data"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataLoggingService
]
instance GrafanaEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Grafana instance visualizing telemetry data on dashboards"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]
instance TrajectoryEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler hosting the trajectory generation service"
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGenerationService
]
instance SimulationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler hosting the physics‑based simulation service"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService
]
instance ValidationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler hosting the continuous validation service"
    DTDFVocab:enables ValidationService
]
instance FaultDetectionEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler hosting the fault detection service"
    DTDFVocab:enables FaultDetectionService
]
instance AlertEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler hosting the operator alert service"
    DTDFVocab:enables AlertService
]
instance MQTTBrokerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Mosquitto MQTT broker for inter‑service messaging"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataLoggingService, VisualizationService
]

// C6: Services
instance DataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that logs incoming telemetry to the TimescaleDB time‑series database"
    DTDFVocab:provides SwingAngleLogInsight, WindSpeedLogInsight, MotorPositionLogInsight, ElectromagnetStateLogInsight
]
instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that streams telemetry data to Grafana dashboards for real‑time visualization"
    DTDFVocab:provides GrafanaDashboardInsight
]
instance TrajectoryGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that generates optimal trajectories using the crane’s kinematic model"
    DTDFVocab:provides GeneratedTrajectoryInsight
]
instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that performs physics‑based simulation of crane motion"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationBaselineInsight
]
instance ValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that continuously compares measured and simulated trajectories, calculating distance metrics"
    DTDFVocab:provides TrajectoryValidationInsight
]
instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that performs fault detection by classifying time‑series signals"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultClassificationInsight
]
instance AlertService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that triggers operator alerts when validation metrics exceed predefined thresholds"
    DTDFVocab:provides OperatorAlertAction
]

// C17: Insights
instance SwingAngleLogInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Logged records of swing‑angle measurements"
]
instance WindSpeedLogInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Logged records of wind‑speed measurements"
]
instance MotorPositionLogInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Logged records of motor encoder counts"
]
instance ElectromagnetStateLogInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Logged records of electromagnet state"
]
instance GrafanaDashboardInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real‑time telemetry visualization on Grafana dashboards"
]
instance GeneratedTrajectoryInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimally generated trajectory for the crane"
]
instance SimulationBaselineInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Baseline trajectory from physics‑based simulation"
]
instance TrajectoryValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Validation metric comparing measured and simulated trajectories"
]
instance FaultClassificationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Classification of faults detected in time‑series signals"
]

// C17: Actions
instance OperatorAlertAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Operator alert notification triggered when validation metrics exceed thresholds"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

// C3: Physical acting components
instance CartMotorActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Cart motor driven by TMC4671Eval controller, used to move the cart along the horizontal rail"
]
instance HoistMotorActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Hoist motor driven by TMC4671Eval controller, used to lift and lower the load vertically"
]
instance ElectromagnetActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electromagnet switched on/off by the Arduino controller to pick up and release pucks"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The Trajectory Generator Service produces optimal, swing‑free trajectory waypoints and publishes them to the MQTT broker. The Control Application subscribes to these trajectory commands, translates them into motor control signals via the Physical Crane Interface, and drives the physical motors. The Continuous Validation Service also publishes alert messages to the broker, which are consumed by the Human‑Machine Interface and displayed on the Grafana dashboard."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "All services operate in a continuous real‑time mode: sensor data are logged continuously, trajectories are generated and validated in real time. The continuous validation service runs asynchronously in real time, validating each executed trajectory as it occurs. Exact time‑tick values are not specified, but the system is designed for milliseconds‑scale responsiveness and instant alerting."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The digital twin constellation is a full stack of containers: Physical Crane (hardware), Physical Crane Interface (Python), Control Application (Python), Logging Application (Python), Human‑Machine Interface (Python/HTML), Database (TimescaleDB), Dashboard (Grafana), Trajectory Generator (Python), Simulation Service (Python), Continuous Validation Service (Python), and MQTT Broker (Eclipse Mosquitto). All components are connected via Docker networking and communicate over MQTT or direct file‑based APIs."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The exemplar represents the crane in its manufactured and operated state: the CAD models and the kinematic simulation were created after the hardware was assembled, and the twin runs on the operated system in continuous validation mode. The twin therefore covers the operating lifecycle phase, while future extensions could model future designs or retrofits."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Validity is ensured by continuous comparison of measured trajectory execution against the simulation model; distance metrics are calculated and checked against a threshold, triggering operator alerts when breached. The CAD and kinematic models are verified against physical measurements, and the data logging pipeline is verified by cross‑checking timestamps and sensor values. Future work aims to incorporate full physical simulation to further tighten fidelity."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Inter‑component communication uses a local MQTT broker (Eclipse Mosquitto) for publish/subscribe messaging; the Physical Crane Interface communicates with the hardware via serial/USB to the Arduino. All messages are transported over TCP/IP sockets within the Docker network."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The twin runs on an individual personal computer (any OS that supports Docker). Docker Compose brings up all containers (TimescaleDB, Mosquitto, Grafana, and the Python services). The source code and container artefacts are hosted openly on GitHub under the MIT license."
]
